title: [FLaW] Food, Life and World
body:
# Welcome to FLaW!

## What can you do?
You can:
- Be a farmer! --We add Farmer Delight series!
- Be an engineers! --We add Create series!
- Be a survivalist! --We add survial mods!
- Our extensive range of modules will allow you to do almost anything!

## Forge? NeoForge? Old/New Version?
- We never will support Forge/NeoFoege/Old Versions/New Versions!
- Why? --Because some mod only support 1.20.1 Fabric.

## Have issue?
- Please send an email to mogm7200@gmail.com!

## Applicable configurations?
- You can happily play FLaW from low to high end!

## Curseforge Page?
- Because author don't like Curseforge, so we DON'T have Curseforge page!

## We add what?
- We add many mod in this modpack! You can download to see!

## Why choose this modpack?
- 1.This modpack is so stable, because we often use this modpack to play Minecraft!
- 2.This modpack have 73 mod(including API mod,unupload's 0.3 version), if you want add more mod, youcan send email to mogm7200@gmail.com!
- 3.This modpack is freedom for everyone, it's doesn't have any limit for players.

## In end, Once again, we welcome you to play FLaW!


## Update plan
- 1.Add more Create series mod and test stability.
- 2.Add more optimize mod, add fps!
